## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What WCAG criterion does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Links to WCAG criteria, examples, or prior art.
